review_text: Amazing powered sites looking over the bay toward French Island. Jetty  and boat ramp right outside park.

Wendy Brennan review: We stayed in our caravan, for 2 nights there last week. Such a lovely little campground, super clean facilities.  Steve, the manager is so lovely, friendly and very helpful.  It was raining  when we arrived, and he bought me an umbrella to use while I was giving backing directions to my husband. The views from our site were awesome, both ways up and down the harbour.So handy for walking along the cliff tracks and around the area.Would definitely stay here again, if diwn this wat.
What a great hidden gem. Our site has beautiful green grass. Sites are large and easy to get into. Amenities are spotless and Steve is very helpful. Will definitely be back.
I have never been so warm at night in a caravan until I stayed here when I only needed a light blanket. The kitchen, bathroom, and beds were super clean

Fantastic place to set up camp. Steve was super helpful. Park was full but quiet. Amenities all working and super clean. Backs out onto the jetty a lot of relaxing fishing was done. Also a general store Down the rode to get burgers or breaky and snacks and bait and petrol.
Thanks Steve will definitely stay again.
Super clean amenities with great view. Got a big welcome from the site manager Steve, he is so friendly and helpful. It's a pet friendly site too. My daughter is so happy to have the puppy with us.

Friendly an helpful manager very clean toilets an showers great walking trails from here very popular with the fishermen,great views over western port to French island , would thoroughly recommend this place to all denis an lynn maloney,,, very close to Phillip island an Wonthaggi an day trips  ,,,

Beautiful little caravan park on the foreshore. Peaceful and super clean amenities. Manager Steve was so helpful, accommodating and hard working. He creates a great vibe in this park. Best Manager I have encountered. Will definitely be back!
Steve at the caravan park is always out to help, the atmosphere is a very homely feeling. We love coming here as a family fishing and relaxing

Very nice place, clean toilet. The sofa in the kitchen is dusting. The camp sites number 30-35 is closed to a unpaved road so they are stirred up cloud of dust when a car go through. However we have a good experience there

This is a lovely little caravan park overlooking the jetty, Western Port Bay and French Island. We stayed for 2 nights on a site under some magnificent large fig trees, at the start of a walking track out to the tip of the peninsula. The park facilities are basic but super clean, staff are friendly and helpful. Highly recommended 😀

Enjoyed our stopover, sites and amenities were extremely clean quiet and relaxed. Very well maintained and the caretaker was amazing.  They even spent the time explaining the local area about places to see and safety info on the water. Thanks

This is my favourite coastal caravan park !!
Location and facilities are A1....sites are very well located in a tranquil location....
The hosts Ann Marie and Mark always go out of their way to make sure our stay is comfortable.....thank you so much guys !!
See you again and again !! 😊😊
I thought it was great.  Anne-Marie and Mark were very friendly hosts.

Fabulous location with million dollar views. Old style park but clean and well kept.
Hosts Mark and Ann-Marie are warm and friendly.

5 ☆☆☆☆☆
wow this park is a gem 💎
definitely will be back , Ann Marie and Mark are so freindly and nice , best managers we have came across in our travels . we had a beautiful view site 2 over looking the bay .
we thoroughly enjoyed our stay.
ammenties are spotless.

thank you so much guys will be back soon!  x

Pet freindly

Corinella Foreshore Caravan Park is right in front of the Corinella Jetty, a 10 min walk from an off-leash beach and a 20 min ride on the barge to French Island - the perfect location for any beach or ocean lover, fisherman, bushwalker or boater. Also the caretakers - Anne Marie and Mark - are super friendly and the nearby Coronet Bay General Store has great takeaway food delivered to the caravan park for $5
This caravan park was great clean vans very clean bathrooms i will be back Brian
